channel.title: 2026-03-27 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-03-27 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Non-Clifford Gates between Stabilizer Codes via Non-Abelian Topological Order
item.description:
📚 PRX Quantum
👤 Rohith Sajith, Zijian Song, Brenden Roberts, Varun Menon, and Yabo Li
Author(s): Rohith Sajith, Zijian Song, Brenden Roberts, Varun Menon, and Yabo Li By leveraging symmetry gauging to transition quantum codes into non-Abelian topological phases, this work enables the implementation of non-Clifford gates essential for universal quantum computing. [PRX Quantum 7, 010361] Published Fri Mar 27, 2026

item.title: Hydrostatic Pressure-Enhanced Correlated Magnetism and Chern Insulator in Moiré WSe₂
item.description: 📚 Phys. Rev. X 👤 Pengfei Jiao et al. Author(s): Pengfei Jiao et al. Hydrostatic pressure acts as a reversible control knob in twisted WSe 2 to enhance ferromagnetism and drive topological phase transitions between Chern and Mott insulating states. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011068] Published Fri Mar 27, 2026
